name: BioCardia, Inc.
business: BioCardia is a clinical-stage regenerative medicine company developing cellular and cell-derived therapeutics for cardiovascular and pulmonary diseases. It also sells approved catheter products including Morph universal deflectable guide catheters, AVANCE steerable introducer, and Morph DNA deflectable guides in the United States.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage company developing cellular and cell-derived therapeutics for the treatment of cardiovascular and pulmonary diseases with significant unmet medical needs.
Our only approved or cleared products are our Morph universal deflectable guide catheters, our AVANCE steerable introducer, and our Morph DNA deflectable guides in the United States.

Our therapeutic candidates intended for cardiac indications are enabled by our Helix transendocardial biotherapeutic delivery system, which enables minimally invasive catheter-based intramyocardial therapeutic delivery.

catalysts.event: Presentation of primary results from open-label roll-in cohort of CardiAMP CMI trial at Euro PCR
catalysts.sentence: Primary results of this cohort have been submitted for presentation at Euro PCR, a world-leading course in interventional cardiovascular medicine, in May of 2026.
We are scheduled to meet with the FDA in the second quarter of 2026, and we expect to receive written feedback.
